texto: The aftermath of someone’s death is vertiginous, a murky, shimmering mass; to look at it head-on is to see only the fog of emotion. One must approach it sideways, entering it by way of an exhumation of facts and retrospections . . .
explicacao: Orientação direta de Nicole Rudick sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “The aftermath of someone’s death is vertiginous, a murky, shimmering mass; to look at it head-on …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, grief, aftermath, útil em momentos de luto e reflexao.
